spell_focus: Dimension Door is the quick-switch spell: branch to branch, environment to environment, project to project. It is not a migration and it is not discovery. It assumes both endpoints are known, prepared, and close enough in shape that you can step across with only the context you actually need.
judge_examples: Keep Dimension Door precise, useful, and distinct from neighboring spells.
Preserve clear deliverables, visible guardrails, and an honest reality boundary.
notes: Inherit the category rubric pack by default and add only spell-specific overrides here.
Use row_overrides.global_must_include and row_overrides.global_must_not_include before inventing a new custom check.
Default deliverables for Dimension Door: ['A clean context-switch checklist.', 'A list of state that must travel with you.', 'A reentry note for getting back to the original location.']

Default guardrails for Dimension Door: ['Do not use quick-switch assumptions for migrations, unknown environments, or destructive cutovers.', 'Call out any hidden state that would be left behind and cause confusion on arrival.']
